sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17587" key="au)tepi/taktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτ-επίτακτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n17587.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">self-bidden, spontaneous,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:156" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.156</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
